roa.docketEntryComment: DEFT'S ADD TO CALENDAR MOT TO REVISE COURT ORDER FILED

/CAL:PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE OR MODIFY PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/X:THE COURT VACATES THE PREVIOUS SENTENCE OF 07-22-14, AND RESENTENCES PAROLEE AS FOLLOWS:/3000REIN/PAJ:50 DAYS /X:PAROLEE SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT FOR  17  DAYS,/4019HALF/X:CLIENT WILL REMAIN IN CUSTODY UNTIL JULY 30, 2014; HEMAY SERVE THE RESTOF HIS SENTENCE AT A RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT PROGRAM, CLIENT MUST COMPLETE  60 ACTUAL DAYS OF TREATMENT THROUGH HEALTHRIGHT360, HE WILL BE TRANSPORTED TO THE PROGRAM BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT, A BED WILL BEAVAILABLE ON JULY 30, 2014, THIS HAS BEEN CONFIRMED BY MICHAEL DAVILA OF HEALTHRIGHT360, ADULT PAROLE HAS THE DISCRETION TO MODIFY TREATMENT, CHANGE THE TREATMENT PROGRAM, SEND PAROLEE INTO A DETOX FACILITY IN THE EVENT OF RELAPSE, AND IMPLEMENTANY OTHER THERAPEUTIC MEASURE AS DEEMED APPROPRIATE DURING THE  60   DAYSOF TREATMENT,/X:PAROLE REINSTATED TO:07-08-14 /X:PAROLEEORDERED TO REPORT TO PAROLE UPONRELEASE AND COMPLY WITH TREATMENT PER PAROLE AGENT,/

/CAL:PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE OR MODIFY PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/PDP/WIAPTR/3000ADV/3000ADM/3000REIN/PAJ:36 DAYS /X:PAROLEE SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT FOR  15  DAYS,/4019HALF/X:CLIENT WILL REMAIN IN CUSTODY UNTIL JULY 24, 2014; HE MAY SERVE THE RESTOF HIS SENTENCE AT A RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT PROGRAM, CLIENT MUST COMPLETE  60 ACTUAL DAYS OF TREATMENT THROUGH HEALTHRIGHT360, HE WILL BE TRANSPORTED TO THE PROGRAM BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT, A BED WILL BE AVAILABLE ON JULY 24, 2014, THIS HAS BEEN CONFIRMED BY MICHAEL DAVILA OF HEALTHRIGHT360, ADULT PAROLE HAS THE DISCRETION TO MODIFY TREATMENT, CHANGE THE TREATMENT PROGRAM, SEND PAROLEE INTO A DETOX FACILITY IN THEEVENT OF RELAPSE, AND IMPLEMENTANY OTHER THERAPEUTIC MEASURE AS DEEMED APPROPRIATE DURING THE  60   DAYSOF TREATMENT,/X:PAROLE REINSTATED TO:07-08-14/X:PAROLEE ORDERED TO REPORT TO PAROLE UPONRELEASE AND COMPLY WITH TREATMENT PER PAROLE AGENT,/
